CustomField.formula: IF (AND(Teams_Channel_2__c !='',Name_for_Team_Channel2__c !=''), HYPERLINK( Teams_Channel_2__c ,Name_for_Team_Channel2__c), IF(AND(Teams_Channel_2__c ='', Name_for_Team_Channel2__c !=''), 'Please paste a Teams Link into Teams Channel 2', IF(AND(Teams_Channel_2__c !='',Name_for_Team_Channel2__c =''), HYPERLINK( Teams_Channel_2__c ,"Channel Link") , '')))
CustomField.label: BAU Team Channel
